sources.notes: Core guideline genes (actionable recommendations): SLCO1B1 (hepatic uptake transporter, c.521T>C rs4149056, all statins), ABCG2/BCRP (efflux transporter, p.Q141K rs2231142, rosuvastatin), CYP2C9 (*2/*3 variants, fluvastatin). Additional genes with pharmacogenetic data: HMGCR (statin target, mechanistic data for SAMS via isoprenoid balance; anti-HMGCR autoantibodies in autoimmune SAMS subtype). CYP3A4/3A5 (drug-drug interaction section, calcium channel blocker interaction for all statins). CYP2C8 (gemfibrozil-fluvastatin interaction, pharmacokinetic data). SLCO1B3 (complete SLCO1B1+SLCO1B3 deficiency causes Rotor Syndrome — disease association data). Excluded: VKORC1/CYP2D6 (other CPIC guidelines only), UGT1A3/UGT2B7 (not named in this paper), CYP2C19 (not named). HMGCR/CYP3A4/3A5 have insufficient evidence for CPIC clinical recommendations but ARE discussed with pharmacogenetic data — appropriate for comprehensive set.
